title: corbularia nivalis
intro: Corbularia nivalis, also known as snow-in-the-rock, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing congestion and relieving chest pain, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory conditions. Corbularia nivalis can be prepared in various ways, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relief from respiratory discomfort.
